title: Snap Shots Plugin
body: As part of the ongoing improvements to this website, I’ve installed a WordPress *plugin* that displays a small preview of external websites when you click on links to them. You can see this in action by following this link to [Snap Shots](http://www.snap.com). If you hover your cursor over the small icon that appears next to the *hyperlink* a popup will appear showing a screenshot of the linked page. This feature is available both as a *plugin* for our *blog* (WordPress, Blogger, and TypePad) and for our browser (Firefox, Explorer, and Safari). [www.snap.com](http://www.snap.com)
